Audit matrix

Audit exception FAQ

Audit exception FAQs matter when operators need direct answers about how reservation pools stay eligible during failover, replay, and quota exception reviews.

The FAQ explains exception triggers, dashboard checks, and the reservation guarantees that auditors expect to see preserved.

It also ties each answer back to the regional recovery playbooks used during incident review.

Related quota guides
